intent: Index duplicated placements of assets-src source families across Studio, Android, built/debug outputs, reference outputs, and the dated zip.
no_move_rule: This index is read-only evidence. Use it for archive-loop review only; exact plan approval is still required before any move.

families.title: World
families.archive_loop_action: Treat as active source-lane material; map mechanics and promotion metadata before runtime use.
families.no_move_rule: Index only. This family map does not approve deletion, archiving, packaging cleanup, or runtime sync.

required_next_gate: Use target_root_summaries and family target_roots to pick a review lane.
For source archive moves, use archive-review candidates and exact plan approval, not this index alone.
For built/debug/Android cleanup, prove the build or package reproduction lane separately.
For source-only families, promote or retain before archive consideration.
